name: jupi-skills
description: Agent Skills for capturing and surfacing team decisions with Jupi — search, log, and submit decisions from inside Claude Code, Cowork, and Cursor.

plugins.name: jupi-skills
plugins.description: Decision skills backed by the Jupi MCP: search-decisions (find prior decisions), log-decision (record a settled call), submit-decision (hand an open call to a decider).

plugins.name: jupi-skills-staging
plugins.description: STAGING — unreleased build of jupi-skills for pre-merge testing. Tracks the `staging` branch; not for production use.

plugins.name: jupi
plugins.description: Jupi proactive decision engine — placeholder; build in progress. Use jupi-staging to test the unreleased version.

plugins.name: jupi-staging
plugins.description: STAGING — unreleased build of the jupi plugin for pre-merge testing. Tracks the `staging` branch; not for production use.
